word: H3331 - יַצַע - yatsaʻ - yaw-tsah' - Make bed

sections.paragraph:
Original: יצע

Transliteration: yatsa‛

Phonetic: yaw-tsah'

BDB Definition:

  1. to spread out, make a bed
    1. (Hiphil) to lay, spread out
    2. (Hophal) to be laid, be spread out

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 896

Part(s) of speech: Verb
